description: 16 unit apartment complex fire incident on 01.31.26. Two apartments & the entire roof sustained structural damage. The roof has already been removed, all apartments have been vacated & tenants relocated. The entire building has been blue tarped & secured after the clean up as of 02.04.2026. HVAC contractor removed 12 of the 16 ac condensors in order to deter theft the day after the fire and we will be reusing. Met with an engineer on 02.05.26 and is currently in the process of making plans/drawings to reconstruct the roof and re-build the two damaged apartments. The other apartments that sustained minor damage will also need renovations.
